prestazioni: Upgrade to a **BorgWarner EFR 8374 (0.92 A/R) turbocharger** for the **2.7L EcoBoost (Nano) CD391 engine**, paired with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe (CVF Performance)** and **Mishimoto intercooler (direct-fit for Edge ST)** to support 450+ WHP on E30 blend fuel with a **COBB Accessport (Stage 2+ aggressive map)** and **Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors**

Full **BC Racing BR coilover suspension (Edge ST-specific valving)** with **polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension 9.5112G)** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** to eliminate body roll and improve turn-in response for autocross/track use

**AP Racing 4-piston front brake kit (CP8810-200S)** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors (slotted, 355mm diameter)** and **Motul RBF 660 brake fluid**, paired with **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines** for fade-resistant stopping power under repeated high-speed braking
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Edge ST-specific, carbon fiber fenders and rear diffuser)** with **custom front splitter (VMR 701 CF)** and **custom rear wing (AIT Racing GT-style, 3-piece carbon fiber)** for aggressive aero balance and downforce

**Vorsteiner V-FF 107 21-inch forged wheels (9.5J front, 11J rear, ET35 offset)** in **Hyper Silver finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35 R21 front, 305/30 R21 rear)** for maximum grip and track-ready performance

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood (Edge ST-specific, vented design)** with **custom LED headlight upgrade (Morimoto XB LED projectors, 5500K color temp)** and **debadged grille (replaced with ST-specific carbon fiber mesh from 3D Carbon)** for a stealth OEM+ look
